features: ✅ Luxury hand soap designed to remove 99% of bacteria and leave your hands clean and protected.
✅ ORANGE & BERGAMOT - Available in our bespoke specially designed high quality fragrance
✅ PRODUCED IN THE UK – We pride ourselves on our British heritage, from design to formulation to packaging, Safe Hands is proudly produced to the highest standards in the United Kingdom.
✅ Safe Hands Luxury Hand Wash 500ml and the Liquid soap refill are available in 3 bespoke scents.
✅ Hand soap refill available in a 5 litre refill in various bulk hand wash quantities & bundles
description: Product Description Safe Hands Luxury Hand Wash | Orange & Bergamot Our Luxury Hand Wash with an Orange & Bergamot Fragrance is specially formulated with moisturizers to protect your skin against dry hands whilst removing 99.9% of bacteria. Our Orange & Bergamot Hand Wash is available in 5 Litre refills allowing you to refill your 500ml bottles up to 10 times! LUXURY HAND WASH REFILL Our Antibacterial Luxury 5 Litre Hand Wash is the perfect choice to refill your empty Safe Hands bottles or soap dispensers. Available in a variety of bulk refill options or with 500ml bottles. The Safe Hands Luxury Hand Wash will leave your hands feeling clean, protected, and moisturized. BESPOKE ORANGE & BERGAMOT FRAGRANCE Safe Hands Luxury Hand Wash is available in 3 bespoke scents. Our Orange & Bergamot fragrance will leave your hands smelling of floral notes. MOISTURISING & PROTECTION Our Luxury Hand Wash utilizes a gentle cleaning formula for effective care. In just one wash our Hand Wash will remove 99.9% of bacteria whilst moisturizing and nourishing your skin. 500ml Luxury Hand Wash We offer our Luxury Hand Wash in a wide variety of pack sizes. Available alone or as part of bundles up to 24. Perfect for everyday use in your bathroom or kitchen. Removes 99.9% of bacteria, moisturizing and lasting protection. 5 Litre Luxury Hand Wash The 5 Litre Luxury Hand Wash Refill is available in a wide variety of pack sizes. Available alone or as part of bundles up to 20. This is the perfect option for businesses or home use. The 5 Litre refill is able to refill your 500ml bottle up to 10 times! Removes 99.9% of bacteria, moisturizing and lasting protection. 5 Litre Luxury Hand Wash with Pump The 5 Litre Luxury Hand Wash Refill with pump is available in a wide variety of pack sizes. Available alone or as part of bundles up to 20. This is the perfect option for businesses or home use. The 5 Litre refill is able to refill your 500ml bottle up to 10 times! Removes 99.9% of bacteria, moisturizing and lasting protection. Luxury Hand Wash Refill Bundles Our Luxury Hand Wash range offers unique pack options offering 5 Litre Refills alongside 500ml bottles or empty 500ml bottles to best suit your needs. his is the perfect option for businesses or home use. The 5 Litre refill is able to refill your 500ml bottle up to 10 times! Removes 99.9% of bacteria, moisturizing and lasting protection.
